title: PostgreSQL batch_item_status enum missing migration_invalid and migration_rolled_back labels

steps.description: Add Alembic migration that adds 'migration_invalid' and 'migration_rolled_back' labels to the batch_item_status PG enum (autocommit, IF NOT EXISTS, off head c062b6bf5eb3)
Review S01 migration: correctness, autocommit_block, IF NOT EXISTS, down_revision chain, label spelling, downgrade no-op
Write tests/integration/test_batch_item_status_enum_drift.py: reproduction (specific label presence) + drift-prevention (Python ⊆ PG enum)
Review S03 tests: semantic correctness (specific values, not shape); one-directional drift check; testcontainer fixture binding; falsifiability
Global review across S01 + S03 — verify migration and test compose into a complete fix; integration tests pass end-to-end
